name: bytestash
description: Skills for operating a ByteStash snippet manager.

bytestash_url.title: ByteStash URL
bytestash_url.description: Base URL of the ByteStash instance, including scheme. Do not include a trailing slash.

bytestash_username.title: Username
bytestash_username.description: ByteStash username. Recommended because current ByteStash snippet CRUD requires a JWT session token.

bytestash_password.title: Password
bytestash_password.description: ByteStash password used by the hook to mint a JWT for snippet API calls.

bytestash_token.title: JWT Token
bytestash_token.description: Optional pre-minted ByteStash JWT. Used when username/password are not configured.

bytestash_api_key.title: API Key
bytestash_api_key.description: Optional ByteStash API key for public/read-only endpoints. Snippet writes still require JWT on current ByteStash.

interface.shortDescription: Manage ByteStash snippets and reusable code notes.
interface.longDescription: ByteStash provides snippet search, creation, update, organization, and troubleshooting workflows for the self-hosted code snippet manager.
defaultPrompt: Use ByteStash to search for a Docker snippet.
Create a ByteStash snippet from this script.
